mapper.select: SELECT DN_MAINKEY FROM t_department_manager WHERE DN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND DN_KEYNO = #{DN_KEYNO}

SELECT DN.* FROM t_department_manager DN WHERE DN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND (DN_MAINKEY IS NULL OR DN_MAINKEY = '') AND DN_LEV='1'
AND DN.DN_HOMEDIV_C = #{DN_HOMEDIV_C}
SELECT DN.* FROM t_department_manager DN WHERE DN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND DN_MAINKEY = #{DN_KEYNO} ORDER BY DN_LEV
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_department_manager ( DN_KEYNO , DN_NAME , DN_TEMP , DN_LEV , DN_HOMEDIV_C ) VALUES ( #{DN_KEYNO} ,'임시부서' , 'Y' , '2' ,#{DN_HOMEDIV_C} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_department_manager WHERE DN_MAINKEY IS NULL AND DN_LEV = '2' AND DN_HOMEDIV_C = #{DN_HOMEDIV_C}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_department_manager SET DN_DEL_YN = 'Y', DN_LEV = '0' WHERE DN_KEYNO = #{DN_KEYNO}
UPDATE t_department_manager SET DN_DEL_YN = 'Y', DN_LEV = '0' WHERE DN_MAINKEY = #{DN_KEYNO}
mapper.select:
SELECT REPLACE(DU_CONTENTS,'\n','
') CONTENTS_BR ,REPLACE(DU_TEL,'\n','
') TEL_BR ,DU.* FROM t_department_user_manager DU WHERE DU_DEL_YN = 'N' AND DU_DN_KEYNO = #{DN_KEYNO} ORDER BY DU_LEV

SELECT * FROM t_department_user_manager DU RIGHT JOIN (SELECT * FROM t_department_manager WHERE DN_HOMEDIV_C = #{DN_HOMEDIV_C}) DM ON DU.DU_DN_KEYNO = DM.DN_KEYNO WHERE DU_KEYNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DU_LEV
mapper.update: UPDATE t_department_user_manager SET DU_DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE DU_KEYNO = #{DU_KEYNO}
mapper.select: SELECT DN.* ,IF(DN_MAINKEY = '', 'DN_0000000000',DN_MAINKEY) MAINKEY ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_department_manager WHERE DN.DN_KEYNO = DN_MAINKEY) CHILD_CNT FROM t_department_manager DN WHERE DN_DEL_YN = 'N' AND DN_HOMEDIV_C = #{DN_HOMEDIV_C} ORDER BY DN_MAINKEY, DN_LEV
SELECT DN_NAME FROM t_department_manager WHERE DN_KEYNO = #{DN_KEYNO} AND DN_DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT B.*, @ROWNUM:=@ROWNUM+1 AS COUNT FROM (SELECT * FROM t_department_user_manager WHERE DU_DEL_YN='N') B WHERE (@ROWNUM:=0)=0 AND DU_DN_KEYNO IN (SELECT DN_KEYNO FROM t_department_manager WHERE DN_DEL_YN='N' AND DN_HOMEDIV_C=#{DN_HOMEDIV_C} ) ORDER BY COUNT DESC ) A LEFT JOIN t_department_manager ON DU_DN_KEYNO= DN_KEYNO WHERE 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND DU_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND DN_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND DU_ROLE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND DU_CONTENTS LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR DU_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR DN_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR DU_ROLE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR DU_CONTENTS LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') )
